name: metis
description: A lightweight toolset for keeping a project's intent, status, and history legible across agent sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Keep your project's intent, status, and history legible across agent sessions.
interface.longDescription: A small framework for AI coding work. Captures what you're building, what's in flight, and what's been decided into on-disk markdown that future sessions rehydrate from at startup. Skills handle the loop: reconciliation, build specs, planning, implementation, review, and session handoff. The paper trail survives session boundaries; the next session picks up where the last one left off.
